title: Safe Division for Metric Ratios
description: Compute success rate metrics without crashing on division by zero when no requests have been made yet.
problem: Write success_rate(successes, total) returning successes/total as a float rounded to 4 decimals, or 0.0 if total is 0.
hint: if total == 0: return 0.0, else return round(successes/total, 4)
